data.title: Nuvve Partners with OMNIA Global to Address 1GW Development Pipeline with First 50MW/75MWh Battery Energy Storage System in Sweden
data.description: Nuvve Holding Corp. (NVVE), a prominent player in advanced energy storage and grid modernization solutions, revealed a new collaboration with OMNIA Global to tackle a pipeline exceeding 1 GW within the next two years, along with the necessary financing. The initial project in line is a 50MW/75MWh European CE-approved battery energy storage system situated in Sweden. This engagement signifies a notable advancement for NVVE in the European energy storage sector.

data.title: Bluebird Fiber Completes Purchase of Everstream Assets
data.description: Bluebird Fiber, a prominent business-only fiber network in the Midwest, has successfully acquired the assets and operations of Everstream, a fiber network covering roughly 25,000 route miles and catering to business clients in the region. This acquisition is set to enhance services for businesses in the Midwest, with Bluebird Fiber expressing excitement over this transaction which merges the strengths of both networks. The purchase marks a significant move in expanding Bluebird Fiber's reach and capabilities in serving Midwest businesses.

data.title: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated to Present at the 2026 RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference
data.description: On March 6, 2026, in Columbus, Ohio, Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (Nasdaq: HBAN) announced its involvement in the 2026 RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference scheduled for March 11, 2026. Brant Standridge, the president overseeing consumer and regional banking, along with Zach, will be part of this event.

data.title: Voomi Supply Secures $10M Series A Led by Asymmetric Capital Partners to Modernize HVAC and Industrial Supply
data.description: In Philadelphia on March 6, 2026, Voomi Supply, a rapidly expanding B2B eCommerce platform catering to the HVAC sector and other industrial trades, revealed the completion of a Series A funding round amounting to $10 million. The funding was spearheaded by Asymmetric Capital Partners. Voomi Supply addresses a void in the market by offering its services to...

data.title: Airwallex Expands High-Yield Treasury Offering to U.S. Businesses; Surpasses US$1 Billion in Global Assets Under Administration
data.description: Airwallex, a global financial platform for modern businesses, has introduced Yield in the U.S., a treasury solution aiming to boost returns on idle cash. This new offering enables customers to efficiently transfer funds from their Airwallex cash balances into an AAA-rated money market fund overseen by J.P. Morgan Asset Management. Through this, businesses have the potential to achieve returns that surpass those of conventional bank savings accounts. The launch in the U.S. expands the reach of Yield, which has garnered significant interest since its inception.

data.title: HONEYWELL ANNOUNCES LAUNCH OF HONEYWELL AEROSPACE'S OFFERING OF SENIOR NOTES IN CONNECTION WITH PLANNED SPIN-OFF
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina - On March 6, 2026, Honeywell disclosed plans to spin-off Honeywell Aerospace Inc. ("Aerospace"). Aerospace has initiated a private offering of a maximum of $16 billion as part of this separation. Honeywell's move aims to enhance the company's focus and operational efficiency.

data.title: NYSE Content Update: Olympian Alysa Liu's Message for International Women's Day
data.description: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) has released a pre-market advisory directly from the trading floor on March 6, 2026. Investors can receive daily updates from the NYSE Trading Floor for valuable market insights before the official market opening. Stay informed with important numbers and trends through the NYSE pre-market update.

data.title: Tsakos Energy Navigation Earnings Review: Q4 Summary
data.description: Tsakos Energy Navigation (NYSE: TEN) released its Q4 earnings report on March 6, 2026, at 08:50 AM. The report revealed that the company surpassed estimated earnings by 38.21%, with an EPS of $1.7 compared to the expected $1.23. Revenue also experienced a notable increase, rising by $33.84 million from the previous year. This positive financial performance indicates a strong quarter for Tsakos Energy Navigation. For a more detailed analysis, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
